chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.401 of 2023 Muhammad Siddique Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 5061/23 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 5062/23 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA 5063/23 Dated: 07.12.2023 None present. -.-.- This appeal is filed against an order of 13.10.2023 whereby after putting the counsel on notice, application for restoration of suit was dismissed as being barred by time. Earlier suit was dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending applications. It was then followed by an application for restoration beyond 30 days period and thus was found to be barred by time, which was accordingly dismissed, as referred above. It appears that neither on the first date of hearing when the suit was dismissed for non-prosecution plaintiff/appellant and his counsel were present nor on the subsequent date when restoration application was fixed and dismissed as being barred by time. Even in this appeal appellant and his counsel are not in attendance and there is no intimation either. On the last date also counsel sought time to prepare the brief but today he has not even bothered to appear. In the circumstances, instant High Court Appeal is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
